title: Estimation of Peroxydisulphate Anion in Presence of Quaternary Ammonium Ions
author: NARENDRA N. GHOSH
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Physical Chemistry, Indian Association for the Cultivation of Science, Jadavpur, Calcutta-700 032 
 Manuscript received 11  July  1986, accepted 5 September 1986  

 The iodometric method for the quantitative estimation of peroxy­disulphate ion in presence of quaternary ammonium ions (Q + ) has been investigated. Q +  ions interfere with the estimation and should therefore be removed quantitatively from the mixture before the iodometric method is adopted, Stoichiometric amount of NaBPh 4  has been used to remove Q +  ions and the procedure is described in detail.
